title: panicum insulare
intro: Panicum insulare is a type of grass native to the Hawaiian Islands, also known as Island Panic Grass or Ohia Grass. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Panicum insulare can be made into teas or infusions, and the plant's root can be dried and used in poultices to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
